g.text: Ask Fikken where the best source for ice crystals can be found.
Translation mostly clear. A few gaps.
A crash-lander, you say? That sounds like a terrible way to arrive
on Enceladus. Tell me more about your ship and where you came from.
Ask Fikken about the materials needed for the ice crystal.
I can certainly look at it, but I don't have any physical tools
readily available. I know the old ways of construction, though; perhaps I ca
